findings: LAUNCHED incremented post-hoc via kill -0 PID probe - not atomic (stampede.sh:1318-1335)
fleet.json written non-atomically - potential corruption risk (stampede.sh:966-967)
Telemetry counters never updated by stampede.sh - depends on commanders (stampede.sh:938,944)
No reconciliation between WORKER_COUNT expected and LAUNCHED actual
Monitor uses filesystem scans for task counts - race-safe (stampede-monitor.sh:27-30)
Agent liveness via tmux pane status - separate from PID files, no reconciliation (stampede-monitor.sh:221-232)
gaps: No launch verification/retry loop; fleet.json not atomic; telemetry self-reported; no cross-validation between PID/tmux/fleet; partial failure silent - no exit code
